phaseProgress.nextPhase: US2 (P2 writing-system matching facets) — resume in a fresh conversation via /speckit.companion.resume
phaseProgress.note: US1 (Setup + Foundational + P1 MVP) landed: 4 base-selection facets (primary-strategy, added-char-count, platform-coverage, font-dependency) + shared kps-reader. facet-index rebuilt --classified-only to 20 facets over 927 keyboards; facet-lint + facet-index-lint + full facet-index vitest (209) all GREEN. Stopped at the US1 phase boundary per the constitution phase-break.

approach: Add 13 new keyboard-facets (4 P1 + 4 P2 + 5 P3) to the standalone utilities/facet-index tool, each a spec-037 {classify,fallback} archetype registered in DEFAULT_CLASSIFIERS, plus real facet-def YAML and nine session mirrors. Measurement only (spec 039 owns transforms); deterministic from in-repo source, reusing buildProducedSet/base-layout.ts/cause-predicates. One new pinned dep: a CLDR exemplarCharacters snapshot for orthography-coverage-ratio.

decisions.decision: Pin a CLDR exemplarCharacters snapshot in-repo under utilities/facet-index/data with a SOURCES.json version pin
decisions.why: orthography-coverage-ratio needs a deterministic reference inventory (FR-004/FR-023); matches how langtags/glottolog/DerivedAge.txt are already pinned
decisions.rejected: Live CLDR fetch or npm dep resolved at build time - breaks byte-determinism, prohibited by FR-004

decisions.decision: Session mirrors only for the nine family-named facets (lineage./source./env./construction.); the four keyboard.* facets are index-only
decisions.why: FR-006 + the clarification pin this; keyboard.* names no session family so a mirror would fail lint contract C4
decisions.rejected: Mirroring all 13 (keyboard.* four have no home family) or none (breaks the two-vocabulary model)

decisions.decision: source.platform-coverage emits modality only (subset of desktop/web/touch) inferred from .kps <Files> extensions, never a <Targets> element
decisions.why: this corpus .kps dialect has no <Targets> (verified vs bambara.kps); file presence cannot distinguish OSes
decisions.rejected: Parsing an assumed <Targets>, or OS-level windows/mac/linux granularity - not derivable from file presence

plan.summary: Planned 13 base-selection facet classifiers on utilities/facet-index reusing the spec-037/040/041 shell; measurement only, deterministic, one pinned CLDR dep
plan.key_finding: All char-derived facets reuse buildProducedSet + base-layout.ts; the only genuinely new build input is a pinned CLDR exemplarCharacters snapshot for orthography-coverage-ratio

tasks.summary: Generated 67 tasks across 6 phases for the 13 base-selection facet classifiers, organized by the three prioritized user stories with tests-first per repo convention
tasks.key_finding: kps-reader is the one foundational blocker (5 source/env facets); script-family (P3) is the durable guard for combining-mark-repertoire (P2), wired inline in US2 then re-pointed at T061

verified.what: facet-index unit suite incl. 4 US1 classifiers + kps-reader

verified.command: tsx cli.ts --classified-only; node facet-lint; node facet-index-lint
